text:

From-To: open->feedback

config.log is not relevant here; can you go to 
work/gst-ffmpeg-0.10.4/gst-libs/ext/ffmpeg/config.err, look for something like 
this: 

1524 BEGIN /tmp/ffmpeg-conf--87465-.c 
1525     1   int main(void){ return 0; } 
1526 END /tmp/ffmpeg-conf--87465-.c 

and paste 10 lines around it, if they contain any errors?
